title: Requesting a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, please submit a request through the IT helpdesk ticketing system. Start by logging into the helpdesk portal and selecting the 'New Hardware Request' option. Fill out the required fields, including your name, department, and the specific hardware you need. Be sure to provide a brief justification for your request, such as project requirements or replacement of faulty equipment. Once submitted, your request will be reviewed by the IT team, and you will receive an update on the status within three business days. If you have any urgent needs, please mention them in your request.
